SEARCH
Package graph

Class Message

java.lang.Object
graph.Message
public class Message extends Object
An immutable container that encapsulates message payloads and automatically handles common data type conversions.

Design and Thread Safety:

This class is designed to be completely immutable. All state fields are declared as public final, allowing safe, direct access from concurrent thread pathways (such as asynchronous worker threads or multiple subscriber agents) without requiring synchronization or risking data corruption.

Conversion and Exception Safeguards:

Constructors reuse the byte-array representation to provide consistent, automated data type conversions. If a text string cannot be successfully parsed into a floating-point numeric value, the asDouble field is gracefully assigned Double.NaN (Not-a-Number) instead of throwing a NumberFormatException. This guarantees processing pipeline stability.

Code Integration Example:


 // Instantiate a message using a floating-point value
 Message doubleMessage = new Message(42.5);
 System.out.println("Text: " + doubleMessage.asText);     // Outputs "42.5"
 System.out.println("Double: " + doubleMessage.asDouble); // Outputs 42.5
 System.out.println("Timestamp: " + doubleMessage.date);   // Record creation timestamp
 
 // Instantiate with raw text that cannot be parsed as a double
 Message textMessage = new Message("Hello World");
 System.out.println("Double representation: " + textMessage.asDouble); // Outputs NaN
See Also:

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    final double
    asDouble
    The numeric representation of the payload.

    final Date

  • Constructor Details

    • Message

      public Message(byte[] data)
      Main constructor taking a byte array. Ensures raw binary data (such as images or video frames) is safe. Initializes all final fields, handles conversions, and records the creation time.
      Parameters:
      data - the raw binary payload array (can be null)

    • Message

      public Message(String asText)
      Constructor taking a String, reusing the main constructor.
      Parameters:
      asText - the text payload string (can be null)

    • Message

      public Message(double asDouble)
      Constructor taking a double, reusing the main constructor.
      Parameters:
      asDouble - the numeric payload value
